foreground_prior_emulator.interpretation: simulation template plus independent observation-like error draw
foreground_prior_emulator.unit_scale: multiply a unit draw by p for p fractional amplitude RMS

geometric_contractions.top1_kpar_core_kperp: highest native |kpar| group and 30--45% kperp span
geometric_contractions.top1_kpar_mid_kperp: highest native |kpar| group and 20--50% kperp span
geometric_contractions.top2_kpar_core_kperp: highest two native |kpar| groups and 30--45% kperp span
geometric_contractions.top2_kpar_mid_kperp: highest two native |kpar| groups and 20--50% kperp span

truth_use: foreground truth is degraded once to emulate an external observed prior; EoR truth and hidden foreground residuals are used only for post-fit validation
validation: independent heldout draw plus signed leave-one-out controls
